geographies.name: World
known_limitations: Global aggregates cannot establish Thailand-specific relevance on their own.

geographies.name: North America West Coast
known_limitations: Coast-level grouping; the platform holds no sub-national administrative geography for North America.

geographies.name: North America East and Gulf Coast
known_limitations: Coast-level grouping; the platform holds no sub-national administrative geography for North America.

geographies.name: United States
known_limitations: Assigned to the West Coast region for hierarchy purposes only; United States nodes appear in both coast regions.

countries.name: Thailand
thailand_relevance_basis: Thailand is the platform's primary analytical viewpoint.

countries.name: China
thailand_relevance_basis: Principal East Asian ocean trade partner for Thailand import and export container flows.
known_limitations: Quantitative trade ranking was not retrieved under WO-010; see docs/ocean_lane_selection.md.

countries.name: Hong Kong SAR
thailand_relevance_basis: Regional transshipment and trade node on Thailand East Asia routings.

countries.name: Taiwan
thailand_relevance_basis: East Asian manufacturing and transshipment relationship on Thailand routings.

countries.name: Japan
thailand_relevance_basis: Long-standing Thailand manufacturing supply-chain and automotive trade relationship.

countries.name: Republic of Korea
thailand_relevance_basis: North East Asian trade partner sharing service strings with Japan on Thailand routings.

countries.name: Singapore
thailand_relevance_basis: Principal transshipment hub for Thailand long-haul ocean connections.

countries.name: Malaysia
thailand_relevance_basis: Adjacent land border and alternative transshipment hubs on the Strait of Malacca.

countries.name: Viet Nam
thailand_relevance_basis: ASEAN intra-regional ocean and cross-border trade partner.

countries.name: Indonesia
thailand_relevance_basis: ASEAN trade partner and littoral state of the Malacca, Sunda and Lombok straits.

countries.name: Philippines
thailand_relevance_basis: ASEAN intra-regional ocean trade partner.

countries.name: Cambodia
thailand_relevance_basis: Adjacent ASEAN partner with combined ocean and cross-border flows.
known_limitations: Cross-border road flows are a Land-module concern and are not assessed by the Ocean module.

countries.name: Myanmar
thailand_relevance_basis: Adjacent ASEAN partner with combined ocean and cross-border flows.
known_limitations: Cross-border road flows are a Land-module concern and are not assessed by the Ocean module.

countries.name: Lao PDR
thailand_relevance_basis: Landlocked neighbour dependent on Thailand ports for ocean access.
known_limitations: Land and rail transit is a Land-module concern; the Ocean module covers only the seaport leg.

countries.name: India
thailand_relevance_basis: Principal South Asian ocean trade partner on Bay of Bengal and Malacca routings.

countries.name: Bangladesh
thailand_relevance_basis: Bay of Bengal ocean trade partner.

countries.name: Sri Lanka
thailand_relevance_basis: Indian Ocean transshipment node on Thailand westbound routings.

countries.name: Pakistan
thailand_relevance_basis: Arabian Sea ocean trade partner on Thailand westbound routings.

countries.name: United Arab Emirates
thailand_relevance_basis: Gulf trade partner and principal Middle East transshipment hub for Thailand cargo.

countries.name: Saudi Arabia
thailand_relevance_basis: Gulf energy and general-cargo trade partner.

countries.name: Qatar
thailand_relevance_basis: Gulf energy trade partner.

countries.name: Oman
thailand_relevance_basis: Littoral state of the Strait of Hormuz and Indian Ocean transshipment node.

countries.name: Kuwait
thailand_relevance_basis: Gulf energy trade partner.

countries.name: Netherlands
thailand_relevance_basis: Principal North European gateway port country for Thailand westbound container cargo.

countries.name: Germany
thailand_relevance_basis: North European trade partner and gateway port country.

countries.name: Belgium
thailand_relevance_basis: North European gateway port country.

countries.name: United Kingdom
thailand_relevance_basis: North European trade partner.

countries.name: France
thailand_relevance_basis: European trade partner with both North European and Mediterranean gateways.

countries.name: Poland
thailand_relevance_basis: Baltic hinterland served through North European gateway ports.

countries.name: Italy
thailand_relevance_basis: Mediterranean gateway country for Thailand westbound cargo.

countries.name: Spain
thailand_relevance_basis: Mediterranean gateway and transshipment country.

countries.name: Greece
thailand_relevance_basis: Eastern Mediterranean transshipment node on Suez routings.

countries.name: Türkiye
thailand_relevance_basis: Eastern Mediterranean trade partner and gateway.

countries.name: Egypt
thailand_relevance_basis: Operates the Suez Canal, the principal Asia to Europe ocean chokepoint for Thailand westbound cargo.

countries.name: United States
thailand_relevance_basis: Principal transpacific export destination for Thailand container cargo.
known_limitations: Assigned to one region for hierarchy purposes; United States lanes are split by coast at the Lane level.

countries.name: Canada
thailand_relevance_basis: North American trade partner served on transpacific strings.

countries.name: Panama
thailand_relevance_basis: Operates the Panama Canal, a routing option for Asia to United States East and Gulf Coast services.

countries.name: Australia
thailand_relevance_basis: Oceania trade partner on direct southbound ocean services.

countries.name: New Zealand
thailand_relevance_basis: Oceania trade partner served on the same service strings as Australia.

countries.name: Yemen
thailand_relevance_basis: Littoral state of the Bab el-Mandeb Strait on the Suez routing.

countries.name: Djibouti
thailand_relevance_basis: Littoral state of the Bab el-Mandeb Strait on the Suez routing.

countries.name: Iran
thailand_relevance_basis: Littoral state of the Strait of Hormuz.

transport_modes.name: Air cargo
notes: No Air indicators, lanes or events are delivered by WO-010.
The shared entities already accept Air records: see NODE-THBKKAIR and the 'air' values permitted throughout observation_common.schema.json.

transport_modes.name: Road freight
notes: No Road indicators or lanes are delivered by WO-010.
The shared entities already accept Road records: see NODE-THSDK and CHK-THSDK-BKH.

transport_modes.name: Rail freight
notes: No Rail indicators or lanes are delivered by WO-010.

transport_modes.name: Border and cross-border transport
notes: No Border indicators or lanes are delivered by WO-010.

transport_modes.name: Inland waterway
notes: No inland-waterway indicators or lanes are delivered by WO-010.

transport_modes.name: Multimodal
notes: Used where an observation or event genuinely spans modes.

transport_modes.name: Not applicable
notes: Used for all-mode aggregates such as national trade totals, where attributing a mode would be an invented precision.

logistics_nodes.name: Laem Chabang Port
role_notes: Thailand's principal deep-sea container gateway.
known_limitations: No live throughput series is enabled under WO-010.

logistics_nodes.name: Bangkok Port (Khlong Toei)
role_notes: River port serving Bangkok with draft and vessel-size constraints.
known_limitations: No live throughput series is enabled under WO-010.

logistics_nodes.name: Map Ta Phut Industrial Port
role_notes: Bulk, liquid and petrochemical port serving the Eastern Economic Corridor.
known_limitations: Predominantly non-container; container indicators do not apply.

logistics_nodes.name: Songkhla Port
role_notes: Southern Thailand port serving Gulf of Thailand feeder services.
known_limitations: Small relative to Laem Chabang; limited public statistics.

logistics_nodes.name: Suvarnabhumi Airport cargo terminal
role_notes: Registered to demonstrate that dim_logistics_node is mode-neutral and already accepts an Air node.
known_limitations: No Air observations, lanes or events are delivered by WO-010; this node carries no data yet.

logistics_nodes.name: Sadao border crossing
role_notes: Registered to demonstrate that dim_logistics_node is mode-neutral and already accepts a Road/Border node.
known_limitations: No Land or Border observations, lanes or events are delivered by WO-010; this node carries no data yet.

logistics_nodes.name: Port of Singapore
role_notes: Principal transshipment hub for Thailand long-haul connections.

logistics_nodes.name: Port Klang
role_notes: Alternative Strait of Malacca transshipment hub.

logistics_nodes.name: Port of Tanjung Pelepas
role_notes: Alternative transshipment hub adjacent to the Singapore Strait.

logistics_nodes.name: Port of Shanghai
role_notes: Major East Asian load centre on Thailand northbound services.

logistics_nodes.name: Port of Shenzhen
role_notes: South China load centre on Thailand services.

logistics_nodes.name: Port of Hong Kong
role_notes: Regional transshipment node.

logistics_nodes.name: Port of Yokohama
role_notes: Japanese gateway on Thailand North East Asia services.

logistics_nodes.name: Port of Busan
role_notes: Korean gateway and North East Asian transshipment node.

logistics_nodes.name: Jawaharlal Nehru Port (Nhava Sheva)
role_notes: Principal Indian container gateway on Thailand westbound services.

logistics_nodes.name: Jebel Ali Port
role_notes: Principal Gulf gateway and transshipment hub.

logistics_nodes.name: Port of Rotterdam
role_notes: Principal North European gateway for Thailand westbound cargo.

logistics_nodes.name: Port of Hamburg
role_notes: North European gateway serving central European hinterland.

logistics_nodes.name: Port of Antwerp-Bruges
role_notes: North European gateway.

logistics_nodes.name: Port of Genoa
role_notes: Western Mediterranean gateway.

logistics_nodes.name: Port of Algeciras
role_notes: Western Mediterranean transshipment hub at the Strait of Gibraltar.

logistics_nodes.name: Port of Los Angeles
role_notes: Principal United States West Coast gateway for transpacific cargo.

logistics_nodes.name: Port of Long Beach
role_notes: Adjacent San Pedro Bay gateway operating with Los Angeles.

logistics_nodes.name: Port of New York and New Jersey
role_notes: Principal United States East Coast gateway.

logistics_nodes.name: Port Houston
role_notes: Principal United States Gulf Coast gateway.

logistics_nodes.name: Port of Baltimore
role_notes: United States East Coast port; retained for the WO-010 historical validation case set.
known_limitations: No established direct Thailand ocean service relationship has been evidenced by this platform.

logistics_nodes.name: Port Botany (Sydney)
role_notes: Principal Australian east-coast container gateway.

logistics_nodes.name: Ports of Auckland
role_notes: Principal New Zealand container gateway.

chokepoints.name: Strait of Malacca
known_limitations: No single operating authority publishes a consolidated restriction notice for the strait.

chokepoints.name: Singapore Strait
chokepoints.operating_authority: Maritime and Port Authority of Singapore
known_limitations: A port marine notice is evidence of the notice, not automatically of impact on any particular lane.

chokepoints.name: Bab el-Mandeb Strait
known_limitations: Security conditions are reported by multiple authorities with differing scope; no single official restriction notice exists.

chokepoints.name: Strait of Hormuz
known_limitations: Primarily an energy-cargo chokepoint; container relevance to Thailand is indirect.

chokepoints.name: Panama Canal
known_limitations: A routing option rather than a required transit for most Thailand services; relevance must be established per lane.

chokepoints.name: Taiwan Strait
known_limitations: No routine operating authority notice channel is registered.

chokepoints.name: Sunda Strait
known_limitations: Alternative to Malacca; used mainly as a diversion routing.

chokepoints.name: Lombok Strait
known_limitations: Alternative to Malacca; used mainly as a diversion routing for deep-draft vessels.

chokepoints.name: Sadao–Bukit Kayu Hitam border corridor
known_limitations: Registered to demonstrate that dim_chokepoint is mode-neutral and already accepts a Road/Border corridor.
No Land or Border data, lanes or events are delivered by WO-010; this chokepoint carries no data yet.
